mapper.insert: insert into `answer` (score_id, test_paper_question_id, answer, score, status) values (#{scoreId}, #{testPaperQuestionId}, #{answer}, #{score}, #{status})
mapper.select: select answer.id, answer.score_id as scoreId, answer.test_paper_question_id as testPaperQuestionId, answer.answer, answer.score, answer.status, tpq.question_id as questionId, tpq.score as questionScore, tpq.type as testPaperQuestionType from `answer` left join test_paper_question tpq on answer.test_paper_question_id = tpq.id where answer.score_id = #{scoreId}

select answer.id, answer.score_id as scoreId, answer.test_paper_question_id as testPaperQuestionId, answer.answer, answer.score, answer.status, tpq.question_id as questionId, tpq.score as questionScore, tpq.type as testPaperQuestionType from `answer` left join test_paper_question tpq on answer.test_paper_question_id = tpq.id where answer.score_id in
#{id}
